title: Payment Transaction
description: Schema for retail and corporate payment transactions processed through the core banking platform

account_id.description: Reference to the account from which the transaction originated

counterparty_account_number.description: Destination account number for outbound transfers

counterparty_sort_code.description: Sort code of the destination bank

counterparty_name.description: Name of the payee or recipient

amount.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR)

fx_rate.description: FX rate applied if currency conversion was involved

transaction_type.description: Classification of the transaction by payment rail or type

merchant_id.description: Merchant identifier for card-present and e-commerce transactions

merchant_category_code.description: ISO 18245 MCC code for merchant category classification

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the transaction was initiated

settlement_date.description: Date the transaction settled in the clearing system

status.description: Current processing status of the transaction

description.description: Narrative description provided by the originator or enriched by transaction intelligence

channel.description: Channel through which the transaction was initiated

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the transaction origin

ip_address.description: IP address of the session that initiated the transaction (online channels only)

device_id.description: Hashed device fingerprint for fraud detection

aml_risk_score.description: AML risk score assigned by the transaction monitoring system

aml_alert_id.description: Reference to AML alert if transaction was flagged for review

is_cross_border.description: True if the transaction crosses national borders

processing_fee.description: Fee charged for processing this transaction
